caption:
未経験からITエンジニアに転職した1日のリアル
在宅ワークで自由な働き方が叶った
#IT転職 #未経験エンジニア #在宅ワーク #転職

scenes.animation_prompt: young East Asian woman in beige knit sweater and light blue knit pants, sitting cross-legged on a white bed, left hand resting on a wooden nightstand beside a phone Starting from her already-upright seated pose with eyes wide and mouth slightly open, she sharply jerks her head downward toward the nightstand, eyes widening further as her brows shoot up and her right hand flies open with fingers splayed in shock — a quick, high-energy flinch lasting under a second. Her mouth opens fully in a silent gasp, jaw dropping as her spine snaps straighter. Then, within the next beat, her shoulders visibly drop, the tension draining out; she exhales slowly through parted lips, eyelids growing heavy. Her chin tilts downward and forward, her right hand curling loosely back into her lap. She begins to lean sideways toward the pillow behind her, her torso softening and sinking, head drooping to one side as her whole body melts into a slow, drowsy collapse back toward the rumpled duvet., static medium shot, slight downward angle from the foot of the bed, holding steady throughout, startled then surrendering back to drowsiness
scenes.background_prompt: スマートフォンのアラームを止めながら布団から半身を起こす若い女性、ベッドサイドにスマートフォン画面で8:50表示、急いで身支度を始めようとしている軽い慌ただしさ、奥にカーテンと窓のあるベッドルーム
scenes.label: 起床

lines.delivery: かすれた寝起き声から急に高く跳ね上げる
眠そうに、二度寝しようと布団に顔を埋めながら甘えるようにつぶやく
lines.text: あともう5分

scenes.animation_prompt: Young East Asian woman in a beige knit sweater and light blue wide-leg pants, standing at a dark-wood standing desk with both hands resting on an open MacBook laptop, a white mug and leather notebook beside it, bright window and bookshelves in background From the still starting pose — hands already gripping the laptop lid, body leaning slightly forward — she sharply inhales, eyes widening as she snaps upright and pulls the laptop fully open with a quick jerk of both wrists, shoulders rising toward her ears in a tense shrug; her head tilts down toward the screen as fingers dart rapidly onto the keyboard with short, urgent taps, jaw slightly open and lips parting as she exhales a clipped breath; then around the midpoint she straightens her spine, squares her shoulders, and tilts her chin upward with deliberate composure, hands settling flat and still on the keyboard in a brief, posed stillness; finally her posture softens, shoulders drop and roll back, a slow deep exhale escapes visibly as her chest falls, the corners of her mouth curl into a quiet smile, and her head tilts gently upward with a relieved, satisfied gaze drifting slightly toward the window, Steady medium shot, slight push-in finishing on a gentle rack-focus to her face at the end, breathless relief settling into calm satisfaction
scenes.background_prompt: ホームオフィスのデスクに駆け込みノートPCを開けようとする女性、奥にアート絵画と
scenes.label: 始業

lines.delivery: 早口で息を切らしながら
lines.text: やばいやばい寝過ぎた！

lines.delivery: 落ち着きを装ったややかしこまった口調
lines.text: 業務開始します！

lines.delivery: 息を吐きながら笑顔で
lines.text: ふうー間に合った セーフ！

scenes.animation_prompt: young East Asian woman in beige knit sweater and light blue jeans, seated at a standing desk with an open MacBook, white mug and closed journal to her left From the tense, forward-leaning starting posture with furrowed brows and hands near the keyboard, she exhales slowly through parted lips and her shoulders drop slightly, eyes narrowing as she tilts her head left toward the screen — anxiety visible in the tight set of her jaw. Around second two she sharply inhales, spine straightening as her eyes widen and her chin lifts upward, fingers freezing above the trackpad with a small jolt of her upper body. From seconds three through seven she leans in closer to the screen, head tilting slightly right, lips moving in a quiet reading murmur, brow gradually smoothing as her gaze tracks steadily left to right across the display at an even, unhurried pace, posture settling back neutrally into the chair. At second seven-and-a-half she gasps audibly, head snapping upright, eyes going wide and bright; a broad grin spreads across her face as she presses both palms flat on the desk and pushes herself back slightly in the chair, chin rising with an upward gaze, shoulders lifting in a buoyant shrug, body swaying gently side to side with barely contained elation., slow push-in from three-quarter angle, holding medium shot throughout, with a subtle tilt up at the final joy beat, anxious relief blooming into delight
scenes.background_prompt: ホームオフィスでノートPCに向かい眉をひそめる女性、画面は暗めで反射のみ、ミニマルな北欧風インテリア
scenes.label: チャット

lines.delivery: ため息混じりに不安そうにつぶやく
lines.text: うわーこれ納期まにあうかなぁ

lines.delivery: ハッと気づいたように声を上げる
lines.text: あ、クライアントからだ

lines.delivery: メールを読み上げるような淡々とした調子
lines.text: 「弊社都合で受け入れテストを1ヶ月延期させて頂きたいです」

lines.delivery: 弾むような明るい高音、語尾を伸ばす
lines.text: やったー！今日飲み行っちゃおうかな〜

scenes.animation_prompt: Young East Asian woman in beige knit sweater and light blue joggers, seated at a wooden desk with an open MacBook laptop and white mug, in a bright minimalist home office From the settled typing posture, she abruptly lifts both hands off the keyboard and her eyes widen, chin pulling back slightly as if startled by a sudden realization — a quick, sharp intake of breath visible in her chest. She tilts her head forward toward the laptop screen, shoulders rising with mild tension. Then, as she exhales slowly, her posture softens and she leans back a few centimeters into the chair, gaze drifting slightly downward and inward, lips pressing together in quiet reflection. Her hands rest lightly on the desk edge, fingers loosely curled. Finally, her chin lifts and her eyes rise upward toward the screen with a gentle, upward tilt of her head; the corners of her mouth ease into a small, relieved smile, shoulders dropping and relaxing fully as she exhales a long breath and settles her hands back onto the keyboard with renewed calm., Slow, gentle push-in from three-quarter wide shot to medium close-up on her face and upper body, holding steady at the end, quiet relief after sudden realization
scenes.background_prompt: ホームオフィスで姿勢を正してノートPCに向かい話す女性、奥にアート絵画と青空の窓、明るく開放的なワークスペース
scenes.label: 研修

lines.delivery: 気づきを表すやや高めの抑揚
lines.text: おっと、今日研修も受けないと！

lines.delivery: 落ち着いた語り口、やや弱め
lines.text: IT未経験で不安だったけど

lines.delivery: 明るく安心したトーンで前向きに
lines.text: eラーニングとか研修制度も充実してるから安心だなあ！

scenes.animation_prompt: Young East Asian woman in beige knit sweater and light blue pants, standing at a raised Flexispot standing desk, typing on an open MacBook laptop, white mug and brown notebook on the desk beside her From the starting pose — standing upright, fingers lightly resting on the keyboard, gaze tilted softly downward at the screen with a gentle smile — she begins typing with a light, rhythmic motion, fingers tapping at a brisk pace as her chin lifts slightly and her gaze rises toward the upper portion of the screen, posture straightening with quiet satisfaction, shoulders settling back and chest opening slightly as the first line's rising pitch carries her upward. Around the 2.4-second mark her typing slows, her right hand drifts off the keyboard and drops below desk level as her wrist curls back toward her lower spine in a subtle self-rubbing gesture, her torso tilts very slightly forward at the hips, brows drawing together gently, head tilting a few degrees to the left with a soft exhale through parted lips. Her gaze lowers back toward the laptop screen as her left hand resumes a slow idle rest on the keyboard edge, the whole posture settling into a looser, slightly fatigued but composed stance by the end., Steady medium shot, very slight slow push-in toward subject, framing waist-to-head, quietly satisfied with a tinge of weary self-awareness
scenes.background_prompt: 明るい部屋で立った姿勢でラップトップに向かう女性、後ろに本棚と山岳写真のアート、観葉植物、北欧モダンインテリア
scenes.label: 立ち仕事

lines.delivery: 感心したように語尾を伸ばす
lines.text: スタンドデスクまじで便利〜

lines.delivery: 腰をさすりながら少し疲れた口調
lines.text: ずっと座ってると腰痛くなるからな〜

scenes.animation_prompt: young East Asian woman in beige knit sweater and blue wide-leg pants, seated at walnut standing desk with open MacBook and white mug, in sunlit minimalist home office From the starting pose — hands resting on laptop keyboard, lips slightly parted, eyes wide and gaze lifted toward the laptop screen — she gasps softly, eyes widening further and eyebrows shooting upward as her chin tilts up; her fingers lift off the keyboard and her torso straightens with a quick upward jolt of surprise. A beat later her expression blooms into a bright grin, shoulders rising with a buoyant inhale; she pulls both hands away from the desk and claps them together once at chest height, then pushes back slightly in the chair with a lively bounce, torso leaning forward as she exhales a cheerful breath and tilts her head lightly to one side — the full-body energy of someone who has just made a snappy, delighted decision., gentle static wide shot, barely drifting a few inches closer toward the end to catch the brightened expression, breezy midday delight
scenes.background_prompt: ホームオフィスのデスクに座り少し前のめりに話す女性、ノートPCを前に、奥にアートと青空の窓、明るく整ったワークスペース
scenes.label: 昼食

lines.delivery: 気づきの軽い驚き
lines.text: あ、もう昼ご飯か

lines.delivery: 弾んだ前向きな口調
lines.text: 一旦スーパー行って晩御飯も作っちゃうか！

scenes.animation_prompt: Young woman in beige knit sweater and light blue knit pants, brown hair pulled back, standing upright at a residential Japanese crosswalk Starting from the still upright pose with arms loosely at her sides and a soft smile, she draws a quick breath and her chest lifts with a small proud exhale as her lips part into a wider grin — chin tilts up slightly and eyes brighten with a brisk, sharp quality matching the fast delivery. Her right shoulder rises a touch as if punctuating the pride in her words, and her gaze drifts briefly downward along the street ahead in a falling-pitch settle. Around the 3-second mark the pace slows: her shoulders drop gently, her head tilts to the right with a soft warmth, eyes squint into a tender smile, and her lips press together in a quiet, satisfied expression. Her arms swing barely inward as her weight shifts almost imperceptibly onto her left foot, body settling into a still, warm, contented stance as the moment lingers., Slight slow push-in from chest-up to gentle medium close-up, steady and unhurried, quiet proud warmth
scenes.background_prompt: 晴れた青空の下、住宅街の横断歩道に立つ女性のバストショット、街路樹と電柱、爽やかな屋外
scenes.label: 道中

lines.delivery: 誇らしげに少し早口で
lines.text: この道案内のアプリ私がちょっと作ったんだよな

lines.delivery: しみじみと柔らかく微笑むように
lines.text: 実際に使ってるところ見るとなんだか嬉しいな！

scenes.animation_prompt: young East Asian woman in beige knit sweater and light blue wide-leg pants, seated at walnut standing desk with MacBook on laptop stand, open notebook and white mug beside her From the starting pose — torso already slightly forward, mouth slightly open, right hand resting on laptop keyboard, eyes wide and fixed on screen — she sharply inhales and her eyes widen further as her chin lifts upward with a quick jerk, left hand flying up off her lap to press lightly against her chest in reflex surprise; she leans her upper body closer toward the laptop screen, shoulders rising toward her ears. At the second beat she jolts upright, spine snapping straight, both hands lifting off the desk as her mouth drops fully open, head tilting back slightly and eyebrows shooting up — a sharp full-body startle with a brief freeze. Then her posture softens into a rapid forward hunch, elbows dropping onto the desk edge, chin jutting toward the screen, lips parting in an awed murmur, head slowly tilting to one side as her brow furrows with a mix of wonder and disbelief, exhaling slowly while her gaze drifts slightly upward in reflective amazement., static medium shot, very slight slow push-in toward subject over 6 seconds, stunned disbelief melting into wide-eyed wonder
scenes.background_prompt: ホームオフィスでノートPCに向かい驚いた表情を見せる女性、画面は暗めで反射のみ、奥にアートと青空の窓、明るいワークスペース
scenes.label: 上司の退職

lines.delivery: 目を丸くして高めの声で
lines.text: 山根さん転職するんだ！

lines.delivery: 声が裏返るほどの強い驚き
lines.text: え 年収200万アップ！？

lines.delivery: 感心と戸惑いが混ざったしみじみ口調
lines.text: お客さんからの引き抜きの誘いってまじであるんだ！

scenes.animation_prompt: Young East Asian woman in a beige knit sweater and light blue wide-leg pants, seated at a walnut standing desk with an open MacBook laptop and a white mug, in a bright minimal home office Starting already seated with both hands resting on the laptop keyboard and a soft smile, she lifts both hands off the keyboard with a small triumphant clap, eyes brightening and chin rising upward as she exhales a quick breath through a wide grin — quick energetic motion matching the brisk 180 wpm opening. She then pushes back slightly from the desk, raises both arms overhead in a full stretch, arching her back and tilting her head back with eyes closing in relief, shoulders lifting toward her ears as the pitch peaks upward around the bath line. Finally she settles forward, rests one elbow on the desk and props her cheek lightly against her knuckles in a dreamy chin-rest, gaze drifting softly toward the window with a slow blink and a lingering satisfied smile, body relaxed and still as the final line trails off in a flat pitch., Gentle slow push-in from mid-wide to medium shot, slightly angled from front-right, holding steady, warm end-of-day contentment
scenes.background_prompt: ホームオフィスのデスクでノートPCを閉じて満足げに微笑む女性、奥にアートと青空の窓、明るくおしゃれな部屋
scenes.label: 退勤

lines.delivery: 解放感のある明るい声
lines.text: よし今日も終わった！

lines.delivery: 伸びをしながら歌うように
lines.text: お風呂入ろう！

lines.delivery: 頬杖をついてうっとり、語尾を伸ばし強調
lines.text: 在宅ワークだし手に職つくしITエンジニア最高すぎる！！

wardrobe_continuity.loungewear_A: ベージュのリブニットセーター、ライトブルーのニットパンツ、ナチュラルロングヘア、ノーメイク風
wardrobe_continuity.workwear_A: グレーのリブ編みハーフジップニット、黒のパンツ、丸メガネ（クリアフレーム）、赤リップ、ロングヘア

home_office.decor: ミニマル北欧風のホームオフィス、Flexispot 風の黒フレーム電動昇降デスク (motorized standing desk with black metal frame, woodgrain top)、エルゴノミクスチェア、観葉植物、白壁、奥にアート絵画と青空の窓、本棚
home_office.lighting: 柔らかい自然光、暖色系、窓からの逆光気味の朝〜昼の光
home_office.color_palette: 白基調、ベージュとライトウッド、グリーンのアクセント
home_office.props: シルバーのMacBook、白いマグカップ、革のノート (PC画面は反射のみで内容は描かない)

bedroom.decor: ナチュラルトーンのベッドルーム、淡いベージュのシーツ、白壁
bedroom.lighting: 朝の柔らかい自然光、淡い色温度
bedroom.color_palette: 白とベージュ基調、淡いブルーのアクセント
bedroom.props: スマートフォン (画面は控えめ)、ベッドサイドの小物

street.decor: 住宅街の横断歩道、街路樹と電柱、晴れた青空
street.lighting: 晴天の自然光、コントラスト中程度
street.color_palette: 青空ブルー、新緑グリーン、白
